confirmations.label: read
confirmations.prompt: Ler o arquivo. Aprova executar: cat a.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: read_absolute
confirmations.prompt: Ler o arquivo. Aprova executar: cat /etc/hosts? [s/N]

confirmations.label: list
confirmations.prompt: Listar o diretório. Aprova executar: ls .? [S/n]

confirmations.label: write_new
confirmations.prompt: Criar e gravar o arquivo. Aprova executar: write new.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: write_overwrite
confirmations.prompt: Sobrescrever o arquivo. Aprova executar: write exists.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: write_mkdir
confirmations.prompt: Criar diretório(s) 'a, a/b' e gravar o arquivo. Aprova executar: write a/b/c.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: edit
confirmations.prompt: Editar o arquivo. Aprova executar: edit exists.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: delete_file
confirmations.prompt: Excluir o arquivo. Aprova executar: rm exists.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: create_dir
confirmations.prompt: Criar diretório. Aprova executar: mkdir newdir? [S/n]

confirmations.label: delete_dir
confirmations.prompt: Excluir recursivamente o diretório e todo o seu conteúdo. Aprova executar: rm -rf d? [S/n]

confirmations.label: move_clean
confirmations.prompt: Mover o caminho. Aprova executar: mv exists.txt b.txt? [S/n]

confirmations.label: move_mkdir
confirmations.prompt: Criar diretório(s) 'x, x/y' e mover. Aprova executar: mv exists.txt x/y/c.txt? [S/n]

function.description: Read a UTF-8 text file and return its contents. Paths are relative to the active workspace root; an absolute path or '~/…' may reach outside it (the user confirms each call). '..' in a relative path is rejected.
function.name: read_file

path.description: Path relative to the active workspace root, or an absolute / ~ path to reach outside it.

function.description: Create a file or overwrite it with the full given content. Creates missing parent directories (with user confirmation). The path is relative to the workspace root.
function.name: write_file

path.description: Path relative to the active workspace root, or an absolute / ~ path to reach outside it.

function.description: Replace the first exact occurrence of old_string with new_string in an existing file.
function.name: edit_file

old_string.description: Exact text to find (must be unique enough).

path.description: Path relative to the active workspace root, or an absolute / ~ path to reach outside it.

function.description: Delete a file (not a directory). The path is relative to the workspace root.
function.name: delete_file

path.description: Path relative to the active workspace root, or an absolute / ~ path to reach outside it.

function.description: Move or rename a file or directory. Creates missing parent directories of the destination (with user confirmation) and overwrites an existing destination (with confirmation). Both paths are relative to the workspace root.
function.name: move_path

destination.description: New path, relative to the workspace root.

source.description: Existing file or directory to move, relative to the workspace root.

function.description: List the entries of a directory (one level). Defaults to the workspace root. Directories are suffixed with '/'.
function.name: list_dir

path.description: Directory path relative to the workspace root. Defaults to '.'.

function.description: Create a directory, including any missing parent directories. The path is relative to the workspace root.
function.name: create_dir

path.description: Directory path to create, relative to the workspace root.

function.description: Delete a directory and all of its contents, recursively. Requires confirmation. The path is relative to the workspace root.
function.name: delete_dir

path.description: Directory path to delete, relative to the workspace root.

function.description: Recursively search file contents under a directory for a plain substring (case-sensitive). Binary files are skipped. Defaults to the workspace root.
function.name: search

path.description: Directory to search under, relative to the workspace root. Defaults to '.'.
